prompt: I just got my Cloudflare R2 credentials - account ID is abc123def456, access key AKEXAMPLE123 and secret SKEXAMPLE456. Help me set up the AWS CLI and rclone so I can start uploading files to a bucket called 'media-assets'. Then upload a test file to verify it works.

assertions.text: Configures AWS CLI profile with correct R2 endpoint format (https://abc123def456.r2.cloudflarestorage.com)
Sets region to 'auto' for R2 configuration
Configures rclone with provider=Cloudflare and the correct endpoint
Shows how to create the 'media-assets' bucket
Shows how to upload a test file and verify the connection
